visual_description: A man with long dark hair and a plaid shirt forces his way through a shattered white door into a bedroom. He raises a large wooden bat and swings it forcefully near a lit lamp and a globe on the wall. He then turns and looks toward a doorway, his back partially turned to the camera.
audio_description: He shouts loudly with a strained voice. The sound of the wooden bat striking is audible.
